title: Verify local budget privacy boundaries
preconditions: Seeded canary financial values pass through success, failure, crash, replay, history, and position workflows while all files, processes, logs, diagnostics, Git state, and temporary locations are observable.
steps: Run the workflows and inspect every boundary named by NFR-BUDGET-LOCAL-DATA-PROTECTION.
expected: All durable artifacts are owner-only where supported; no canary payload appears outside explicit structured data results; no tracked or shared temporary financial artifact remains.
